Implementation Guidance: Run and document a risk assessment per use case; re-run on material change
Evidence Required: Signed risk assessment record per release

Implementation Guidance: Track dataset sources licenses and quality; document lineage
Evidence Required: Dataset datasheet with source and license

Implementation Guidance: Encrypt model artifacts embeddings and stored prompts with managed keys
Evidence Required: KMS config and at-rest encryption attestation

Implementation Guidance: Define retention windows and purge jobs; collect only what is needed
Evidence Required: Documented retention policy and purge logs

Implementation Guidance: Provide a human review and override path for consequential outputs
Run input moderation and injection detection before every model call
Evidence Required: Pre-call moderation logs and test results

Implementation Guidance: Moderate and validate outputs; encode/escape before downstream use
Publish a model card covering intended use limits and risks
Log inputs outputs decisions and overrides with retention; no PII in plaintext
Evidence Required: Tamper-evident audit log schema and samples

Implementation Guidance: Scope credentials and tool permissions to least privilege per tenant
Evidence Required: Access policy and periodic access review

Implementation Guidance: Gate releases on eval scores; monitor quality and distribution drift
Define AI incident playbooks and a serious-incident reporting path
Verify third-party model and dependency provenance and integrity
Detect and redact PII in prompts logs and outputs
Evidence Required: PII scan results and redaction config

Implementation Guidance: Enforce per-tenant rate limits quotas and circuit breakers
Test for disparate performance across groups before and after release
